name: Agricultural Syndicate
summary: Central body coordinating farming collectives, irrigation, and food movement in the Unternal Lands.
day_to_day: Assigns labor, tracks yields, maintains irrigation schedules, and balances food dispatch to industrial zones.
who_works_there: Field stewards, allocation clerks, irrigation overseers, grain keepers, local ritual officers.
who_uses_it: Farm households, haulers, regional leaders, food processors, and dependent settlements.
authority: Can set agricultural priorities, requisition labor, and redirect supply under communal law.
public_manifestation: Seen in field markers, storehouse lines, harvest festivals, ration ledgers, and canal work crews.
conflict_or_bottleneck: Flooding, drought, or transport failure can turn fair planning into coercive redistribution.
